name: @aurora/desktop
description: Aurora Music - 跨平台优雅音乐播放器
author: Aurora Music <aurora-music@example.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,green "cd ../app && npx vite --host" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron ."
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron .
scripts.build: cd ../app && npx vite build && cd ../desktop && rm -rf app-dist && cp -r ../app/dist app-dist && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npx electron-builder
scripts.build:dir: cd ../app && npx vite build && cd ../desktop && rm -rf app-dist && cp -r ../app/dist app-dist && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npx electron-builder --dir
